pageContext.name: Ultraman Suit Taro (Anime Version)
pageContext.description: From the 'ULTRAMAN' Season 2 anime, ULTRAMAN SUIT TARO is now available as a sixth scale articulated anime figure! Kotaro Higashi, a young journalist with strong sense of justice, has suddenly acquired a unique ability due to a mysterious incident, and happens to obtain a new ULTRAMAN SUIT still in development. Under the name of TARO, he enters battle against aliens attacking earth.   FigZero 1/6 ULTRAMAN SUIT TARO (Anime Version) stands approximately 12.2 tall, and is a fully-articulated figure with over 52 points of articulation. The Ultraman collectible figure has a detailed paint application and decals, and is constructed partially of die-cast zinc alloy and other metal parts. LED light-up features are installed at the eyes and the Color Timer on the chest.  TARO's iconic blazing fire effects come in multiple forms for this Ultraman collectible: 1 pair for chest, 1 pair for upper back, 1 pair for lower back, 1 pair for fists, and 1 piece in shooting form. Other accessories include the Ultra Badge which Kotaro uses in transforming into ULTRMAN SUIT TARO form, and multiple interchangeable hands: 1 pair of fists, 1 pair of knife-hands, 1 pair of fire shooting hands, and 1 right hand for holding the Ultra Badge.
